flows.name: wopr-changeset
flows.description: WOPR continuous delivery pipeline: architect -> code -> review -> fix -> merge.

states.name: architecting
coding
reviewing
fixing

constraints.description: Issue has been flagged 3+ times for the same finding. Requires human intervention.

gates.name: spec-posted
gates.failurePrompt: The architect spec comment was not found on Linear issue {{entity.artifacts.refs.linear.key}}. Check that the architect posted a comment containing '## Implementation Spec' on the issue before signalling spec_ready.
gates.timeoutPrompt: Timed out checking for architect spec on {{entity.artifacts.refs.linear.key}}. The Linear API may be slow or unreachable. Retry the spec_ready signal.

gates.name: review-bots-ready
gates.failurePrompt: CI checks failed on PR #{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} in {{entity.refs.github.repo}}. Run `gh pr checks {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}}` to see which checks failed. Fix the failures in the worktree, push, and re-signal pr_created.
gates.timeoutPrompt: CI or review bots did not complete within 30 minutes for PR #{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}}. Check CI status and whether bots are configured for this repo. Re-signal pr_created to retry.
